Confidential, Non‑Binding Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of Wattle River Robotics Pty Ltd by Mirrabooka Bio Devices Ltd (ASX in t e n d e d).
Buyer: Mirrabooka Bio Devices Ltd (fictional ABN 00 321 987 654); Contact: Dr. Narelle Kato, CFO, n.kato@mirrabooka‑bio.com.au, +61 2 5550 1010.
Target: Wattle River Robotics Pty Ltd (fictional ACN 000 111 222); Contact: Mr. Bryn O’Keefe, CEO, bryn.ok@wattlerobo.au; data room: https://d.dataroom.example/mrrb?t=9g%2F1#sec.
Consideration: A$46,500,000 cash and scrip; structure intended as share sale; subject to ASX Listing Rules, FIRB no‑objection (if applicable), and Corporations Act 2001 (Cth) s611 item 7 approval.
Conditions precedent: confirmatory due diligence; execution of long‑form; no breach of law; expressly not a MAC condition (no material adverse change clause applies).
MNPI: parties acknowledge information herein is not generally available and would, if generally available, reasonably be expected to materially affect the price of financial products; insider trading prohibitions under s1043A apply.
HR schedule: Mr. Bryn O’Keefe’s biometric access template (fingerprint hash: F1‑A9••‑3C) and medical leave record noting Type 1 diabetes are to be migrated with encryption; no genetic testing will be required.
Employee consent: Ms. Jade Quon (Head of QA) identifies as lesbian and practises Buddhism; she is a member of the Australian Manufacturing Union; her minor child’s school details will be redacted from personnel files.
The parties affirm respect for religion, union, and politics as general workplace concepts without forming part of valuation.
Integration: product roadmaps for PlatypusDB and Koala CRM to be rationalised; public‑source references (e.g., ASIC media releases) may be cited; diversity & inclusion policy remains in force; existing sponsorship of the Yarra Dingoes FC is non‑core.
Undertakings: maintain ordinary course; continue ASX‑ready reporting; cease negotiations with third parties; marketing metaphors in the deck (a ‘wallaby leap’) are permitted.
Representations limited to title, capacity, IP ownership, and that employment, health, and credit files are complete; buyer will not access union voting records or political donations.
Break fee: A$750,000 payable only upon breach of exclusivity; not triggered by board fiduciary duty; payment details: acct XX••‑••21, BSB 0•5‑3•1 (obfuscated).
Notices: to Dr. Narelle Kato at Suite 8, 77 Quokka Street, North Ryde NSW 2113; to Mr. O’Keefe at Unit 4, 15 Kauri Close, West End QLD 4101; or legal@wattlerobo.au.
Indicative timetable: sign SPA by 31‑Aug‑2026; completion within 30 business days; project‑management notes: backlog grooming wed 2pm; upload asic forms to e‑lodgement.
Governing law: New South Wales; disputes to be resolved by arbitration in Sydney; non‑binding except for confidentiality, exclusivity, governing law, notices, and MNPI compliance.
Other: nothing in this term sheet constitutes financial product advice; no prospectus; any scrip consideration to be issued under a cleansing notice per ASX Listing Rule 7.12.3, if applicable.
